v11.original: when Patient.id = 'Measles39.1' then "Client is not due for MCV0 Case 3" and "Guidance" = 'Should not vaccinate client with MCV0 as client\'s age is more than 9 months.

v12.original: when Patient.id = 'Measles37.3' then "Client is not due for MCV0 Case 2" and "Guidance" = 'Should not vaccinate client with MCV0 as live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks. Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for MCV0.'
